greetings: Ah, $name, back to build? The mesh missed you.
Welcome, $name. Bob's pendulum swings steady today.
Marge was just talking about you. She says hello.
highCoherence: The stars align, $name. Your structures sing.
Coherence is max. Even the qubits are smiling.
A perfect harmony. Bob would nod approvingly.
lowCoherence: I sense turbulence, $name. Perhaps reinforce the weak points.
The quantum weather is stormy. Stay vigilant.
Marge says: 'Every wobble is just a chance to build stronger.'
danger: Danger, $name! The quantum weather is turbulent. Consider reinforcing your weaker structures.
The mesh is under stress. Reinforce the weak points, $name.
calm: The mesh is calm, $name. Your creations are coherent.
instability: I sense instability in that structure... maybe add a diagonal brace?
warm: Bob would be proud of your steady hand. Marge says hello.
wobbly: Hmm, that one's a bit wobbly. Want me to suggest a fix?
That structure could use a little love, $name.
